scripts.install-all: npm run install:gateway && npm run install:auth && npm run install:user && npm run install:catalog && npm run install:playlist && npm run install:likes && npm run install:history && npm run install:search && npm run install:admin
scripts.build-all: npm run build:gateway && npm run build:auth && npm run build:user && npm run build:catalog && npm run build:playlist && npm run build:likes && npm run build:history && npm run build:search && npm run build:admin
scripts.build:gateway: cd api-gateway && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.build:auth: cd auth-service && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.build:user: cd user-service && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.build:catalog: cd catalog-service && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.build:playlist: cd playlist-service && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.build:likes: cd likes-service && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.build:history: cd history-service && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.build:search: cd search-service && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.build:admin: cd admin-service && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.health:check: npm run health:gateway && npm run health:auth && npm run health:user && npm run health:catalog && npm run health:playlist && npm run health:likes && npm run health:history && npm run health:search && npm run health:admin
scripts.health:gateway: curl -s http://localhost:3000/health | jq . 2>/dev/null || echo 'Gateway not running'
scripts.health:auth: curl -s http://localhost:3001/health | jq . 2>/dev/null || echo 'Auth Service not running'
scripts.health:user: curl -s http://localhost:3002/health | jq . 2>/dev/null || echo 'User Service not running'
scripts.health:catalog: curl -s http://localhost:3003/health | jq . 2>/dev/null || echo 'Catalog Service not running'
scripts.health:playlist: curl -s http://localhost:3004/health | jq . 2>/dev/null || echo 'Playlist Service not running'
scripts.health:likes: curl -s http://localhost:3005/health | jq . 2>/dev/null || echo 'Likes Service not running'
scripts.health:history: curl -s http://localhost:3006/health | jq . 2>/dev/null || echo 'History Service not running'
scripts.health:search: curl -s http://localhost:3007/health | jq . 2>/dev/null || echo 'Search Service not running'
scripts.health:admin: curl -s http://localhost:3008/health | jq . 2>/dev/null || echo 'Admin Service not running'
